# SeaSalt Process CMakeLists.txt
# Generated by CATChem Process Generator

# Add SeaSalt process module
add_library(seasalt_process
    ProcessSeaSaltInterface_Mod.F90
    ProcessSeaSaltCreator_Mod.F90

    # Scheme modules
    schemes/Monahan_Mod.F90
    schemes/Smith_Mod.F90
    schemes/Jaegle_Mod.F90
    schemes/Ovadnevaite_Mod.F90
)

# Link dependencies
target_link_libraries(seasalt_process
    CATChem_core
)

# Include directories
target_include_directories(seasalt_process PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/schemes
)

# Install targets
install(TARGETS seasalt_process
    DESTINATION lib
)

# Install module files
install(FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/processseasaltinterface_mod.mod
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/processseasaltcreator_mod.mod
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/monahan_mod.mod
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/smith_mod.mod
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/jaegle_mod.mod
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/ovadnevaite_mod.mod
    DESTINATION include
)
